title: EDICITNET EVENT PLANNING PACKAGE
author: Pettit, Marisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document drafted by UBER includes guidelines for both online and on-site (offline) events. For each type of event, there are indications of what to do before, during and after the event. The document is also designed having the Living Lab events especially in mind, given the importance of monitoring them correctly. However, any partner organizing a big public event is requested to follow this new SOP. It is meant to guide partners in order to assure proper monitoring of events, so that it can be adequately reported to the EC.
